creator: erwin@schliske.de
text:
Hi Colin,

>> The Directory 7.0-RELEASE/sparc64 doesn't exist on the update server.
>> Which method is the official one to install updates on sparc64?
>
> FreeBSD Update does not support sparc64 currently -- basically it  
> comes down
> to sparc64 hardware not being fast enough to do FreeBSD Update  
> builds without
> delaying security advisories, and cross-building of FreeBSD Update  
> updates
> not working yet.
>

I read a lot in the freebsd handbook but I can't find how I get  
security updates for sparc64.

I am using Linux for years, so I am not an newbie in *nix world, but  
FreeBSD is completely new for me.

I set up the server from cd with 7.0-RELEASE. How ports are to manage  
I found out but how have I to deal with the basesystem.

Thank you.


Erwin Schliske
